title: vaccinium corymbosum f. albiflorum
intro: Vaccinium corymbosum f. albiflorum, also known as the white-flowering blueberry, is a variant of the American blueberry plant, characterized by its white or pale pink flowers and edible blue-black fruits. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vaccinium corymbosum f. albiflorum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and may also be used in jams, preserves, and other food products.
